task_description: Fix accentcard and cleancard Quran display modes to auto-fit text like fullcard mode, keeping typewriter animation. Card size should follow the longest surah so text never gets cut off.

verification.build: skipped - no JS build step, static asset
verification.tests: skipped - no unit tests for web assets
verification.syntax: pass - brace/bracket count delta matches pre-existing state
verification.summary: Added autoFitToTwoLines pre-measurement to renderAccentCard. The function now sets full text (including ref line), calls autoFit to shrink font to fit 2 lines, saves computed font sizes, locks .q-card container + individual element min-heights, reserves quran space at FULL measured size, then clears elements and types with saved sizes. cleancard inherits fix via renderAccentCard delegation. Second fix (d7bf47f) resolved remaining layout shift caused by ref line not being included in pre-measurement.
